message:
fix(session): atomic sidecar rebuild with staging/backup swap and trash-based deletion

Harden create_v2_sidecar_from_jsonl() to safely rebuild an existing
sidecar without data loss: build the new sidecar in a unique staging
directory, rename the existing sidecar to a backup path, swap staging
into place, then clean up the backup. If any step fails, the original
sidecar is preserved.

Refactor delete_session_file_with_trash_cmd() to attempt trash deletion
of the session file first and only clean up the sidecar directory on
success, preventing orphaned sidecar removal when the primary file
deletion fails.

Add test create_v2_sidecar_from_jsonl_preserves_existing_sidecar_on_rebuild_failure
verifying that appending invalid JSONL to a session file causes the
rebuild to fail while preserving the original sidecar's frame IDs.

Update resource expansion tests to use std::slice::from_ref instead of
slice literal to avoid unnecessary Clone bounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
